expectations.text: Provides Vulkan build command with GGML_VULKAN=ON
Recommends HIP/ROCm over Vulkan for best performance on Strix Halo
expectations.evidence: States HIP provides better performance with hipBLASLt, recommends HIP for max performance

expectations.text: Mentions Vulkan model loading issues or known limitations on Strix Halo
expectations.evidence: Does not mention issue #18741 or specific Vulkan model loading failures on Strix Halo

expectations.text: Acknowledges Vulkan as a reasonable alternative when ROCm is impractical
expectations.evidence: Recommends Vulkan for 'simplicity and zero ROCm overhead', suggests building with both backends
